title: Love Untangled
tmdbOverview: A lovestruck teen plans to win the school heartthrob by going from curly to straight hair — until a new transfer student changes everything.
synopsis: Love Untangled is a 2025 romance, drama and comedy film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
